billing.accountDrawerServiceBreakdownFallbackHin: This breakdown comes from the latest billing snapshot instead of 30-day daily detail, and currently covers about {coverage}% of total consumption. Use it cautiously for fine-grained analysis.
billing.accountDrawerServiceBreakdownCoverageHin: This breakdown is based on recent 30-day detail, but it currently covers only about {coverage}% of total consumption, so some services may still be missing.

billing.accountDrawerFallbackRecommendation: This account is estimated to remain available for {days} more days. Reserve a buffer in advance for workload fluctuations.
billing.accountDrawerNoReferenceRecommendation: The current sample covers fewer than 7 days, so there is not enough reference data yet to estimate days remaining.

validationErrorCodes.validation_failed: Credential validation failed. Please check your configuration, including access key, secret key, and region settings.
validationErrorCodes.aws_invalid_access_key_id: Validation failed: Invalid access key ID. Please check your AWS access key ID.
validationErrorCodes.aws_invalid_secret_key: Validation failed: Invalid secret key. Please check your AWS secret key.
validationErrorCodes.aws_ssl_error: Validation failed: Network connection error or invalid credentials. Please check your access key ID, secret key, and region, and ensure network connection is normal.
validationErrorCodes.aws_invalid_credentials: Validation failed: Invalid access key or secret key. Please check your AWS access key ID and secret key.
validationErrorCodes.aws_invalid_region: Validation failed: Invalid region configuration. Please check your selected AWS region.
validationErrorCodes.huawei_ssl_error: Validation failed: Network connection error or invalid credentials. Please check your access key, secret key, and region, and ensure network connection is normal.
validationErrorCodes.huawei_invalid_credentials: Validation failed: Invalid access key or secret key. Please check your Huawei Cloud access key ID and secret key.
validationErrorCodes.huawei_invalid_region: Validation failed: Invalid region configuration. Please check your selected Huawei Cloud region.
validationErrorCodes.azure_invalid_authentication: Validation failed: Invalid authentication information. Please check your tenant ID, client ID, and client secret.
validationErrorCodes.azure_invalid_subscription: Validation failed: Invalid subscription ID. Please check your Azure subscription ID.
validationErrorCodes.alibaba_invalid_credentials: Validation failed: Invalid access key or secret key. Please check your Alibaba Cloud access key ID and secret key.
validationErrorCodes.alibaba_invalid_region: Validation failed: Invalid region configuration. Please check your selected Alibaba Cloud region.
validationErrorCodes.alibaba_need_sts_get_caller_identity: RAM permission required to get account ID. In Alibaba Cloud RAM console, create a custom policy with Action: sts:GetCallerIdentity for this user, then validate again.
validationErrorCodes.tencentcloud_invalid_credentials: Validation failed: Invalid access key or secret. Please check your Tencent Cloud Access Key ID and Access Key Secret.
validationErrorCodes.tencentcloud_invalid_secret: Validation failed: Invalid secret. Please check your Tencent Cloud Access Key Secret.
validationErrorCodes.tencentcloud_no_permission: Validation failed: Account has no billing/access permission. Please check CAM permissions or App ID.
validationErrorCodes.baidu_invalid_credentials: Validation failed: Invalid access key. Please check your Baidu AI Cloud Access Key ID.
validationErrorCodes.baidu_invalid_secret: Validation failed: Invalid signature or secret key. Please check your Baidu AI Cloud Secret Access Key.
validationErrorCodes.baidu_no_permission: Validation failed: Account has no finance/billing access permission. Please check Baidu AI Cloud billing permissions.
validationErrorCodes.zhipu_invalid_credentials: Validation failed: Invalid username or password. Please check your Zhipu login credentials.
validationErrorCodes.zhipu_invalid_token: Validation failed: Invalid or expired login token. Please check your Zhipu login session.
validationErrorCodes.zhipu_no_permission: Validation failed: Account has no finance access for the selected organization or project.
validationErrorCodes.volcengine_invalid_credentials: Validation failed: Invalid access key. Please check your Volcengine Access Key ID and Secret Access Key.
validationErrorCodes.volcengine_invalid_secret: Validation failed: Invalid signing secret. Please check your Volcengine Secret Access Key and signing configuration.
validationErrorCodes.volcengine_rate_limit: Validation failed: Too many requests. Please try again later.
validationErrorCodes.volcengine_timeout: Validation failed: Request timed out. Please check your network connection or service response.
validationErrorCodes.volcengine_no_permission: Validation failed: Account has no billing access permission. Please check your Volcengine account permissions.
validationErrorCodes.ssl_error: Validation failed: Network connection error. Please check your network connection and credential configuration.
validationErrorCodes.timeout_error: Validation failed: Connection timeout. Please check your network connection and region configuration.
validationErrorCodes.network_error: Validation failed: Network connection error. Please check your network connection.
validationErrorCodes.aws_cost_explorer_permission_denied: Permission denied: Missing Cost Explorer access permission. In AWS IAM, add a policy allowing Action: ce:GetCostAndUsage for this user, then validate again.
validationErrorCodes.huawei_bss_permission_denied: Permission denied: Missing BSS billing access permission. In Huawei Cloud IAM, enable BSS and add permissions: bss:bill:read and bss:account:read, then validate again.
validationErrorCodes.huawei_intl_bss_permission_denied: Permission denied: Missing BSS International billing access permission. Enable Billing Service in Huawei Cloud International console and add appropriate permissions, then validate again.
validationErrorCodes.alibaba_bss_permission_denied: Permission denied: Missing BSS billing access permission. In Alibaba Cloud RAM, add permission: bss:ReadOnlyAccess for this user, then validate again.
validationErrorCodes.tencentcloud_billing_permission_denied: Permission denied: Missing billing access permission. In Tencent Cloud CAM, enable 'Cost Analysis' service and add policy: QcloudBillingReadOnlyAccess, then validate again.
validationErrorCodes.azure_consumption_permission_denied: Permission denied: Missing consumption data access permission. Add role assignment in Azure subscription Access control (IAM): Reader or custom role (with Microsoft.Consumption/read permission), then validate again.
validationErrorCodes.volcengine_billing_permission_denied: Permission denied: Missing billing center access permission. Enable 'Billing Center' service in Volcengine console and add appropriate permissions, then validate again.
validationErrorCodes.baidu_billing_permission_denied: Permission denied: Missing financial data access permission. Enable 'Finance' service in Baidu AI Cloud console and add appropriate permissions, then validate again.
validationErrorCodes.missingPermissionsHint: Please add the required permissions by following the steps below, then validate again

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.subtitle: Choose how to select among multiple enabled global configs, and how failures are handled.
strategy.multiModelNote: When multiple global configs are enabled (by order), the following applies:
strategy.failureBehaviorFirst: First: Always use the first active config (lowest order). If that call fails, the request fails immediately — no automatic fallback to the next config.
strategy.failureBehaviorRoundRobin: Round-robin: Each new request uses the next config in order. If a call fails, that request fails; the next request will use the next config in the rotation.

channels.name: Name
channels.orderDesc: The active channel with the smallest order value is used for sending; smaller value = higher priority, same value uses creation time.
channels.messagePrefixDesc: Prepended to the message body when sending; some platforms require a source identifier.

channels.signSecretEditHint: Leave blank when editing to keep current secret
channels.mergeEnabledDesc: Merge multiple notifications with the same key within the time window.
channels.mergeWindowMinutesDesc: 0 = no merge; use with Enable merge when > 0.
channels.editSaveHint: You can save directly if nothing was changed; after changing config, validate first then save.

channels.testRecipientEmailDesc: Optional. If filled, a test email will be sent to this address; otherwise only SMTP connection is tested.
channels.silenceWindowMinutesDesc: Same alert will not be sent again within this period (only once); 0 means no silence.
channels.isActiveDesc: When off, this channel will not be used for sending.
channels.setDefaultDesc: Use this channel when no channel is specified.

form.name: Task Name
form.taskTypeHelp: Select the type of scheduled task to execute
form.minuteHelp: Minute (0-59), comma-separated for multiple, * for every minute

form.dayOfMonthHelp: Day of month (1-31), comma-separated for multiple, * for every day
form.dayOfMonthInvalid: Day of month must be a number between 1-31, comma-separated for multiple
form.monthOfYearHelp: Month (1-12), comma-separated for multiple, * for every month
form.monthOfYearInvalid: Month must be a number between 1-12, comma-separated for multiple
form.dayOfWeekHelp: Day of week (0-7, both 0 and 7 mean Sunday), comma-separated for multiple, * for every week
form.dayOfWeekInvalid: Day of week must be a number between 0-7, comma-separated for multiple

form.hourInvalid: Hour must be a number between 0-23, comma-separated for multiple

form.enabledHelp: When enabled, the task will automatically execute according to the schedule rules

hostsPage.filtersSubtitle: Narrow the list by name and task status to find risky hosts faster.

exportScopes.filteredHint: Keep the current data source and active filters when exporting.
exportScopes.dataSourceAllHint: Ignore local page filters and export every host in the selected data source.

hostsPage.activeFiltersSubtitle: Filters currently applied to the list
hostsPage.listSubtitle: Primary facts first, anomalies on the right, so the table is easier to scan.
hostsPage.detailSubtitle: Inspect host metadata, runtime state, resource authorization and error output.

tasksPage.title: Task management
tasksPage.subtitle: Inspect collection execution history and trigger new sync jobs by data source.
tasksPage.scopeHint: Review collection execution state within the current data source scope
tasksPage.completedSubtitle: Collection jobs completed successfully in the current list
tasksPage.runningSubtitle: Collection jobs still in progress in the current list
tasksPage.failedSubtitle: Collection jobs that failed in the current list
tasksPage.filtersSubtitle: Filter by execution state to focus on failed, running or pending jobs.

taskDetailPage.title: Task detail
taskDetailPage.subtitle: Inspect execution time, collected totals and error output.

settingsPage.title: Data source management
settingsPage.dataSourcesSubtitle: Manage HyperBDR source endpoints, activation state and manual collection entry points.
settingsPage.systemSubtitle: Maintain collection strategy, retry settings and SMTP configuration.
settingsPage.dataSourceSectionSubtitle: Create, edit or disable HyperBDR data sources. Collection and filtering both rely on these connections.
settingsPage.systemSectionSubtitle: Saved values apply to new collection tasks and mail delivery.
settingsPage.newDataSourceSubtitle: Connect a new HyperBDR data source.
settingsPage.editDataSourceSubtitle: Update an existing data source configuration.
settingsPage.passwordHintEdit: Leave blank to keep the current password
settingsPage.toggleSourceError: Failed to update data source status
settingsPage.loadSourceDetailError: Failed to load data source detail
